ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-13-2022 Continued To Aug-23-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Nuris, via Zoom, for Peter Prongos and Catherine Giouzelis, Co-Administrators.

Mr. Nuris advises that a report had been submitted for filing but was rejected by the Clerk's office and requests additional time to resubmit the report. Counsel is advised regarding why his report had been rejected, as shown in the clerk's notes shown in the e-filing history of this matter. The court reminds counsel of the pending issues including no Inventory and Appraisal ("I&A") has been filed, no accounting and no petition for final distribution or petition for approval of status of administration. Counsel advises that a pending tax issue with the City and County of San Francisco has delayed the I&A.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Aug-23-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
